pattern: A single scan tracks the absence count and the longest run of lates, returning false the moment either rule is broken.
hints: Two independent conditions must hold: fewer than two absences and no three lates in a row.
Count total A characters and watch for the substring of three consecutive L characters.
Sweep once tracking total absences and the current consecutive-late streak; fail if absences reach two or the streak reaches three.

edge_inputs.description: one absence and short late runs

stress.description: random records over the three allowed characters
